title: Can I show subfolders of my inbox in Thunderbird for Android beta?
creator: Darlha
content:
Hello all,

I installed Thunderbird for Android beta at my smartphone. After importing my account from the desktop version of Thunderbird I don't see the subfolders of my inbox. How can I show subfolders in the app for Android?

Kindest regards
